nodes.label: Earnings Mode — AI pre-filter + analysis pipeline.
Two-phase earnings pipeline: AI summary → filter → analysis.
Returns the configured LLM client for earnings mode.
Fetch all earnings from Finnhub calendar API.
Fetch market cap + sector for tickers via FMP batch profile (50 per call).
Apply filters that use already-fetched data.
Apply filters requiring per-ticker API calls (on already-reduced list).
Keep companies with solid recent earnings history.
Keep companies with >10% analyst upside potential.
Ask AI to summarize today's earnings landscape.
Simple summary when AI is unavailable.
Build a structured analysis prompt with verified data.
Phase 1: Fetch earnings, get Trinity summary, return filter chips.
Phase 2: Apply filters, build prompt, stream AI analysis.
Stream AI response with thinking + content tokens.
